diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,172 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: src/hono/index.ts, src/hono-base/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory for creating handlers and middleware with support for 1-10 handlers with typed environments.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts, src/utils/url.ts
+- Safe summary: Route introspection utilities for examining matched routes, paths, and parameters.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, defineWebSocketHelper, WSReadyState, WSContext, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent, WebSocketHelperDefineContext, WebSocketHelperDefineHandler
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: src/types/index.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper providing event-driven WebSocket connections with state management.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/cookie.ts (if exists), src/utils/cookie.ts
+- Safe summary: HTTP cookie utilities for reading and setting cookies including signed cookies with prefix support.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
+- Neighbor files: src/client/index.ts, src/hono/index.ts, src/context/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing client wrapper that creates a mock client using custom fetch for testing Hono apps.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection helper that identifies the runtime environment (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light, other) and provides env bindings.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ../../utils/html, ./common
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: Experimental CSS-in-JS helper for server-side rendering with class name hashing and style injection.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, rawCssString, minify, buildStyleString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug
+- Reads as: (none - standalone utility)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Core CSS utilities with class name hashing, minification, and template style parsing.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception/index.ts, src/utils/headers.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding requests with RFC 2616 and RFC 9110 compliance for hop-by-hop headers.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/color.ts, src/utils/handler.ts
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting and displaying registered routes and handlers.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML escaping helper with template string interpolation and callback support.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg, getSSGData, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Static Site Generation helper for pre-rendering routes with async request support.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, ToSSGResult, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface
+- Reads as: ../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime, ./middleware, ./plugins, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG functionality for fetching and saving static content to filesystem with configurable concurrency.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: ../hono, ../../router
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for SSG including path manipulation and route filtering for static generation.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: ../../context, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG context middleware for marking routes as static-generated and handling SSG-specific logic.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, SSEMessage, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Aggregated streaming helper exports including stream, SSE, and text streaming APIs.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/utils/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming response for chunked data delivery with automatic closing and error handling.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
